title: Kaolack Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kaolack with a Z-Score of +3.77. This critical event has a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Kaolack are extreme, with a heat wave that is significantly above average. 
 The temperature is causing a high cooling degree day (CDD) value of 12.2 GG, while the relative humidity is at 46% and wind speed is 16.6 km/h. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with no heating degree days (HDD) recorded, indicating a critical situation for the city.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the heat wave's effects.
